title: steenisia elata
intro: Steenisia elata, also known as the Steenisia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The Steenisia elata tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Steenisia elata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Steenisia elata is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures or extracts.
